Ayesha's BooseApp Documentation
Table of Contents

Interface IAppCanvas

Namespace
BOOSEapp
Assembly
BOOSEapp.dll

Provides additional drawing methods for an application canvas, extending BOOSE.ICanvas.

public interface IAppCanvas : ICanvas
Inherited Members
ICanvas.Set(int, int)
ICanvas.SetColour(int, int, int)
ICanvas.MoveTo(int, int)
ICanvas.DrawTo(int, int)
ICanvas.Clear()
ICanvas.Reset()
ICanvas.Circle(int, bool)
ICanvas.Rect(int, int, bool)
ICanvas.Tri(int, int)
ICanvas.WriteText(string)
ICanvas.getBitmap()
ICanvas.Xpos
ICanvas.Ypos
ICanvas.PenColour

Methods

Circle(int, bool, bool)

Draws a circle with the specified radius.

void Circle(int radius, bool filled, bool overrideRestrictions)

Parameters

radius int

The radius of the circle.

filled bool

Whether the circle is filled.

overrideRestrictions bool

Whether to override drawing restrictions.

Rect(int, int, bool, bool)

Draws a rectangle with the specified width and height.

void Rect(int width, int height, bool filled, bool overrideRestrictions)

Parameters

width int

The width of the rectangle.

height int

The height of the rectangle.

filled bool

Whether the rectangle is filled.

overrideRestrictions bool

Whether to override drawing restrictions.
